title: sideroxylon durifolium
intro: Sideroxylon durifolium, also known as the yellow ironwood or Durio tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Sideroxylon durifolium include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to aid in reducing fever and relieving pain. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
